= camel restart

Restarts running Camel integrations (stop + re-launch)


== Usage

[source,bash]
----
camel restart [options]
----



== Options

[cols="2,5,1,2",options="header"]
|===
| Option | Description | Default | Type
| `-h,--help` | Display the help and sub-commands |  | boolean
|===
